sections.section_purpose: To describe the technical approach to meet the requirements.
sections.response_guidance: Describe how the supplier will operate within the defined technical environment and meet service attributes and application requirements.

sections.section_purpose: To ensure the supplier's security framework aligns with the engagement's requirements.
sections.response_guidance: Describe compliance with security obligations, including probity, conflict of interest, and Defence policies and standards.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the project management and governance approach.
sections.response_guidance: Describe participation in meetings and compliance with governance frameworks.

sections.section_purpose: To detail the service management framework and performance management.
sections.response_guidance: Describe participation in performance reviews, meeting KPIs, and supporting reporting aligned to performance measurement.

sections.section_purpose: To describe the approach to service delivery and transition.
sections.response_guidance: Describe how services will be delivered aligned to milestones, acceptance criteria, and support testing activities.

sections.section_purpose: To demonstrate the supplier's experience and approach to Australian Industry Capability (AIC).
sections.response_guidance: Provide a draft AIC Schedule and demonstrate engagement with local businesses and alignment with Defence AIC policies.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the personnel involved in delivering the services.
sections.response_guidance: List personnel required to deliver services and any stand-down conditions.

sections.section_purpose: To provide the pricing structure and compliance with payment arrangements.
sections.response_guidance: Provide pricing in accordance with the SOW pricing structure and comply with Work Order pricing arrangements.

sections.section_purpose: To address compliance with intellectual property provisions.
sections.response_guidance: State compliance with IP provisions defined in the SOW.

sections.section_purpose: To ensure plans are developed and maintained as required.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the development and maintenance of plans aligning with performance, reporting, and governance requirements.
